sentence_patterns: My mom and I go on a ___
I am an egg. Will you color me ___?

activity_types: Circle/Find — 시작 소리 그림 또는 글자 찾기
Color the letters — 큰 글자 색칠

textbooks.title: Common Core Sight Words
textbooks.structure: 4 Units, 각 6 content vocab + 6 sight words

units.subject: Social Studies
units.title: In My Classroom
sentence_patterns: Is this your ___? Yes, it is.
Is that your ___? No, it isn't.

units.subject: Art and Music
units.title: Let's Play Music!
sentence_patterns: Do you want to play with me now?

activity_types: Vocabulary at a Glance (Content 6 + Sight 6 한 페이지)
개별 단어 페이지: 그림 + 문장 (Circle picture word, Underline sight word)
Practice: 별 모양 카드 4~5개 중 sight word 찾기
Review: Cut and paste로 문장 완성

textbooks.title: THEMED SPEAKING Vol.2 - Spring and Colors
textbooks.structure: 4 Parts (Vocabulary / Thinking Skills / Simple Writing / Speak Up)

lessons.activity: Colors+Shapes 듣고 붙이기 + circle 정답
Spring activities 듣고 붙이기 + circle 정답
그림-단어 매칭 → 'It is a [color] [shape]' 붙이기
Spring 그림-단어 매칭 → 'It is spring / I ride a bike / I see flowers / I blow bubbles'
Colors+Shapes circle / Spring activities circle 종합
Word Box(Colors+Shapes) 활용 질문 4개 + NOT belong
Word Box(Spring) 활용 질문 3개 + NOT belong
도형 조합으로 집 그리기 (triangle→square→circles→rectangle)
spring/winter 분류 (plant seeds, snow angel, ice skating, picnic)
친구 찾기 (Who has/can/likes) + Take a Break (6 differences)
색깔 단어 매칭+따라쓰기 / Spring 동사구 매칭+따라쓰기
'It is a [color] [shape]' 따라쓰기 (heart, triangle, square, oval) / 'I/We like to...' 문장
'It is a [color] [shape]' 따라쓰기 (star, circle, rectangle, diamond) / 'He/She/They likes/like to...'
문장 보고 그림 알파벳(a~e) 매칭 + Answer key
Q&A 역할극 + Listen and circle (5문제)
짝과 역할극 (What do you have? / What happens in spring?)
그림-문장 매칭 (I have a(n) ___) + 선물상자 follow the lines
Spring 자연현상 매칭 + 보드게임 (START→FINISH, dice)
Cut & paste 대화 완성 + Draw/write/talk

sentence_patterns.question: What do you like to do in spring?
What does your friend like to do?
sentence_patterns.answer: He/She likes to ___ / They like to ___

sentence_patterns.question: What happens in spring?
sentence_patterns.answer: Seeds sprout / Flowers bloom / Rain drops / Trees grow / Frogs wake up in spring.

textbooks.title: THEMED SPEAKING Vol.1 - My School Is Fun
textbooks.structure: 4 Parts (Vocabulary / Thinking Skills / Simple Writing / Speak Up)

lessons.activity: 사람/성격 8단어 듣고 붙이기 + circle 정답
학교 활동 듣고 붙이기 + circle 정답
그림-단어 매칭 (speak, read, play, listen) → 문장 붙이기
사람 그림-단어 매칭 (friendly, smart, teacher, shy) → 문장 붙이기
학교 활동 circle / 친구 특성 circle 종합
Word Box(학교 활동) 활용 질문 3개 + NOT belong
Word Box(사람/성격) 활용 질문 3개 + NOT belong
학교 일과 순서 정하기 (morning/before lunch/at noon)
Good/Not Good 분류 (I help my friend / She always fights)
친구 찾기 (Who has/can/likes) + Take a Break (미로)
학교 활동 매칭+따라쓰기 / 성격 매칭+따라쓰기
'I/We like to ___' 따라쓰기 / 'This is my ___ / My friend is ___'
'He/She/They likes/like to ___' / 'My friend is ___ / He/She is ___'
문장 보고 그림 알파벳(a~e) 매칭 + Take a Break (가방 미로)
Q&A 역할극 + Listen and circle (5문제)
짝과 역할극 (What can you do in the ___? / What is your friend like?)
그림-문장 매칭 (I can ___ in the ___) + Follow lines
성격 그림-문장 매칭 + Spin wheel (He/She is ___)

sentence_patterns.question: What do you like to do at school?
What does your friend like to do?
sentence_patterns.answer: He/She likes to ___ / They like to ___

sentence_patterns.question: What can you do in the ___?

place_action_combinations.sentence: I can swing in the playground.
I can write in the classroom.
I can eat in the lunchroom.
I can read in the library.
I can jump in the gym.
